75+48.llm_explanation: In base-9, 75 (base-9) is 7*9 + 5 = 68 (base-10), and 48 (base-9) is 4*9 + 8 = 44 (base-10). Summing gives 68 + 44 = 112 (base-10). Converting back to base-9: 112 ÷ 9 = 12 with remainder 4, 12 ÷ 9 = 1 with remainder 3, so 112 (base-10) is 134 (base-9).**
